headline: O'Reilly Automotive Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: O'Reilly Automotive (NASDAQ:ORLY) reported a strong start to fiscal 2026, led by better-than-expected comparable store sales growth and operating profit expansion, while management reiterated a cautious stance on the consumer and maintained most of its full-year outlook. Comparable sales rise 8.1%

headline: O'Reilly (ORLY) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Participating on the call with me this morning are Brent Kirby, our President, and Jeremy Fletcher, our chief financial officer.  Greg Hensley, Executive Chairman, and David O'Reilly, our Executive Vice Chairman, are also present on the call.
